## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Security fix

## Testing

- [ ] I have tested this on Linux
- [ ] I have tested this on macOS  
- [ ] I have tested this on Windows
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] I have tested with `--features standalone`
- [ ] I have tested with `--features proprietary` (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have updated documentation
- [ ] I have added/updated tests
- [ ] I have verified no compiler warnings
- [ ] I have checked for security issues
- [ ] I have verified backward compatibility
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated
- [ ] API docs updated
- [ ] Examples added (if new feature)
- [ ] Migration guide added (if breaking change)
